message:
Implement two-phase oneshot channel with reserve/commit pattern

Add cancel-safe oneshot (single-use) channel that uses two-phase
reserve/commit to prevent message loss during cancellation:

- Sender::reserve() creates a SendPermit (phase 1)
- SendPermit::send() commits the single value (phase 2)
- SendPermit::abort() explicitly cancels the send
- Receiver::recv() waits for value with cancel-safety

Key features:
- Single-value channel (exactly one message)
- Non-Clone sender (consumed on reserve or send)
- Cancel-safe at every point in the protocol
- 17 unit tests covering all scenarios

Implements: asupersync-dyk

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
